message:
feat(node): expand lockstep harness, supply chain certification, staking governance, and cross-subsystem refinements

lockstep_harness.rs (+69 lines): expand deterministic lockstep
execution harness with improved step tracking and divergence
detection

supply_chain/certification.rs (+70 lines): add certificate chain
validation and revocation checking for supply chain attestations

staking_governance.rs (+28 lines): expand governance stake
validation and voting power computation

perf_budget_guard.rs (+17 lines): add budget tracking refinements

isolation_rail_router.rs (+13 lines): expand rail routing logic

audience_token.rs: continued test variable and ID cleanup from
prior session (consistent naming with descriptive IDs)

cancellation_protocol.rs: minor adjustments
dgis_migration_gate.rs: migration gate refinements
compat_gates.rs: compatibility gate adjustments
divergence_gate.rs, evidence_replay_gate.rs, fork_detection.rs,
key_role_separation.rs: consistent assert! pattern in test match arms
adversarial_runner.rs, impossible_default.rs: security module tweaks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
